## Type of Change
- [ ] Feature branch (`feature/*` → `develop`)
- [ ] Bugfix (`feature/*` → `develop`)
- [ ] Hotfix (`hotfix/*` → `main` and `develop`)
- [ ] Release (`release/*` → `main` and `develop`)

## Description
<!-- Brief description of changes -->

## Related Issue
Closes #(issue number)

## Testing
- [ ] Tested locally in browser (Chrome, Firefox, Safari)
- [ ] Validated HTML with html5validator
- [ ] Responsive design tested (mobile, tablet, desktop)
- [ ] All CSS custom properties honored

## Screenshots (if applicable)
<!-- Add screenshots for UI changes -->

## Checklist
- [ ] Branch name follows Git Flow convention
- [ ] Code follows project style (Syne for headings, DM Sans for body)
- [ ] No external dependencies added without approval
- [ ] Tested on mobile breakpoint (900px)
- [ ] Animation/scroll-reveal effects tested
